Infrastructure New Zealand says there's a gap in our climate change response - that a national entity needs to fill
Infrastructure New Zealand says there's a gap in our climate change response - that a national entity needs to fill
23 November 2024
Currently there are no formal nationwide standards or processes for recovery and adaptation.
Chief Executive Nick Leggett, says we're missing national level leadership.
He says this leaves communities exposed, when they try to recover post disaster.
>>
